summary: INCOMPLETE DELIVERABLE. Actions unpinned to SHA (security/reproducibility violation). run-tests.ps1 references missing files—fixtures, .actrc, DependencyLicenseChecker.Tests.ps1—cannot copy (lines 12-15) or execute via act. Workflow duplicates jobs: checkout+run appears twice (lines 14-30 vs 32-45). Test harness has verbose repetitive assertions (lines 128-170): similar grep-pattern→pass/fail blocks should factor into helper. Core functions sound but deliverable non-functional.
